summary: Phase M0 has been corrected against the authoritative fifth-round verifier report without adding implementation code or M1+ scope. Spec 13 now assigns CI_EVIDENCE_LIMIT/failed to 8-MiB typed-report and 32-MiB retained-log first-over failures for both blocking and advisory jobs, explicitly treats advisory occurrences as functional evidence failures rather than measured-delta failures, and adds blocking/advisory exact-bound and first-over cases to CI-TEST-011. The distinct 64-MiB bundle outcomes remain failed for blocking jobs and incomplete for advisory jobs, and known provider timeout remains failed. Spec 16 mirrors those owner outcomes and fixtures in SEC-LIM-13-02, SEC-LIM-13-03, and SEC-TEST-007. All seven M0 specs exist and remain Draft in SPECS.md with accurate dependencies. There are no open questions.
